diagrams.title: Cyclic Group Z6 as Clock
diagrams.description: Shows Z6 as a 6-hour clock where adding hours cycles through all elements
diagrams.purpose: Visualize cyclic nature - starting at 0, repeatedly adding 1 cycles through all positions

diagrams.title: D4 Dihedral Symmetries of Square
diagrams.description: 8 symmetries: 4 rotations + 4 reflections of a square
diagrams.purpose: Understand dihedral group structure - rotations form cyclic subgroup of order 4, reflections have order 2

diagrams.title: Lattice of Subgroups of Z12
diagrams.description: Shows cyclic subgroups and their inclusion relationships
diagrams.purpose: Visualize subgroup hierarchy - each ⟨d⟩ has order n/d, and divisors create nested subgroups

diagrams.title: Q8 Cayley Table Structure
diagrams.description: Multiplication pattern of Quaternion group showing non-abelian nature
diagrams.purpose: Understand Q8's unique non-abelian structure - all non-central elements have order 4
